title: task
description: sim_client.py:346-349 - When receiving an oversized message (>MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH), we read the 4-byte length header but NOT the body, then raise ProtocolError without closing the stream. If the caller catches the exception, subsequent reads will start mid-message, causing protocol desync. The stream should be closed/invalidated after any ProtocolError to prevent silent corruption.
close_reason: Already fixed: oversized message handling invalidates stream (self._stream = None) before raising ProtocolError, preventing protocol desync
